# Fixture Scaffolding and Execution Notes

This directory tracks fixture data for migration-safety assertions.

## Executable now
- Products baseline invariant fixtures via `backend/tests/products/products-baseline.spec.ts`.
- Customers baseline invariant fixtures via `backend/tests/customers/customers-baseline.spec.ts`.

## Placeholder/deferred
- Auth/Tenancy fixtures remain partially placeholder until dedicated assertion specs are expanded.
- Transaction/finance/procurement fixture packs remain deferred.
